KC
Karen C. · Perks Rewards Gold
Member since 2019 · 12 orders · last seen 2 days ago
Hi — I ordered two cases of Tide detergent last week and they never arrived. Order #BJ-847291.
Memory recall
Karen's order #BJ-847291 shipped Mar 14, carrier exception logged Mar 16: delivery attempted, no access to building. She's a Gold Perks member — flag for priority resolution.
Hi Karen — I can see what happened. The carrier attempted delivery on March 16th but couldn't access your building. As a Gold Perks member, I'll reship this priority-free right now. Want it sent to the same address?
Yes please! Thank you for sorting that so fast.

Agent Memory Platform

Knows every Perks Rewards member by name — and by history.

Delight.ai stitches BJ's membership data, order history, club preferences, and Perks balance into a single evolving profile — accessible the moment a member reaches out.

  • Unifies membership tier, order history, and club check-ins in real time.
  • Surfaces what matters now: last order, open tickets, Perks balance, renewal date.
  • Learns from every resolved interaction — gets smarter with every BJ's member.
How memory works
MEMORY Karen — Perks Gold · 4-year member
Last order: 2× Tide 96-load, 1× Kirkland coffee Mar 14
Preferred club: Walpole, MA · usually shops Friday AM Trend
Perks balance: 3,200 pts · renews June 1 Live
First-contact resolution+41% YoY

Omnipresence

One member. One memory. Every BJ's touchpoint.

Whether a member texts, calls, chats on BJs.com, or taps a kiosk in the club — they get the same AI agent with the same full context. No starting over. Ever.

  • Drop-in connectors for BJs.com chat, mobile app, IVR voice, and in-club kiosks.
  • Seamless hand-off to BJ's service team without losing a single detail.
  • Proactive outreach: notifies members before they even know there's an issue.

Trust OS · Responsible AI

Enterprise guardrails your compliance team will actually approve.

Every AI response runs through Delight.ai's Trust OS before it reaches a BJ's member — keeping accuracy, brand voice, and data privacy ironclad at scale.

  • Full audit trail on every AI decision — reviewable by your ops team at any time.
  • CCPA-compliant PII handling with configurable data residency across US regions.
  • Watchtower QA auto-grades 1% of all conversations daily against your policy.

Three things no other AI support platform can match.

Generic AI handles tickets. Delight.ai handles members — with context, continuity, and the kind of care that turns a service call into a loyalty moment.

Questions BJ's teams ask us.

Things that come up before teams make the switch. Have more? Book a call.

How does Delight.ai connect to BJ's existing membership data?

Delight.ai connects via REST API and webhook to BJ's membership platform, order management system, and Perks Rewards data. We have pre-built connectors for Salesforce, Zendesk, and ServiceNow — plus custom integrations for proprietary systems. Setup typically takes 1–2 weeks.

How does Delight.ai handle BJ's seasonal volume spikes?

Our platform is built on Sendbird's infrastructure, which handles 7B+ messages per year globally. Auto-scaling kicks in within seconds. During Thanksgiving and holiday surges, Delight.ai absorbs 40–60% of incoming ticket volume — freeing your agents for complex escalations while response times stay under 10 seconds.

Is Delight.ai compliant with CCPA and BJ's data policies?

Yes. Delight.ai is SOC 2 Type II certified and CCPA-compliant. PII is redacted automatically. Data residency can be configured to US East Coast regions. Our Trust OS provides a full audit trail on every AI decision — reviewable by your compliance team at any time.

How long does it take to go live across BJ's channels?

Most teams go live within 2–4 weeks. We provide drop-in SDKs for BJs.com, the mobile app, and kiosk surfaces — plus IVR integration for phone. A dedicated launch architect is staffed on every BJ's deployment from day one through 90-day post-launch review.

Build the AI concierge BJ's members will actually love.

30 minutes with a launch architect. We'll map your top three member journeys to a live Delight.ai deployment — on your data, in your channels.
